steps.title: Weigh 0
steps.instruction: Weigh 0.5 g of soil (remove debris like stones or large particles).

steps.title: Add the soil sample into the PowerBead Pro Tube
steps.instruction: Add the soil sample into the PowerBead Pro Tube.

steps.title: Add Solution CD1 to the tube as per kit instructions
steps.instruction: Add Solution CD1 to the tube as per kit instructions.

steps.title: Homogenize the sample using one of...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the sample using one of the following Vortex Adapter method.

steps.title: Ensure proper mixing and cell lysis through homogenization
steps.instruction: Ensure proper mixing and cell lysis through homogenization.

steps.title: Add Solution CD2 to remove impurities
steps.instruction: Add Solution CD2 to remove impurities.

steps.title: Add Solution CD3, then load the...
steps.instruction: Add Solution CD3, then load the sample into the MB Spin Column.

steps.title: Wash the column with Solution EA...
steps.instruction: Wash the column with Solution EA followed by Solution C5 to ensure purity.

steps.title: Elute the DNA using Solution C6...
steps.instruction: Elute the DNA using Solution C6 to collect the extracted DNA.

steps.title: Perform electrophoresis on an agarose gel to confirm DNA quality
steps.instruction: Perform electrophoresis on an agarose gel to confirm DNA quality.

steps.title: Use a Nanodrop spectrophotometer to measure DNA concentration and purity
steps.instruction: Use a Nanodrop spectrophotometer to measure DNA concentration and purity.

steps.title: Send the extracted e-DNA to the...
steps.instruction: Send the extracted e-DNA to the FAILSAFE Project Team at Chulalongkorn University for further analysis.
